summary: Hyunwoo enters a dungeon and accepts a quest from Chroma, a sorcerer of the giants, to grant salvation to his corrupted brethren by slaying them. After clearing the dungeon and managing his exhausted companion Tangy, Hyunwoo shifts his focus to streaming, where he engages in high-level Arena ranked matches. Setting restrictive challenges for himself, he dominates his opponents while simultaneously coaching them, eventually declaring his intention to take the top spot in the Arena rankings.
key_moments: Hyunwoo accepts a quest from Chroma to defeat the corrupted giants in Arperium.
Hyunwoo finishes the dungeon and attempts to console his overworked companion, Tangy.
Hyunwoo begins a live stream where he defeats ranked opponents using restrictive self-imposed challenges.
Hyunwoo declares his intention to reach the top rank of the Arena before the end of the season.
